input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the package is complete for this COU, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act on an alarming-looking but adequately-addressed signal. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: Few validation samples, but against an exact analytic solution over the domain.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 validation sufficiency; proto-taxonomy D-VAL-08

case_context.cou: the surrogate informs a maneuver decision within the two-body regime

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The system is analytically tractable (exact Keplerian truth); 6 samples spanning the domain matching analytic truth to 1e-6 are decisive validation for the two-body regime — sample count is not the right sufficiency measure when truth is exact.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.justification: sparse samples against exact analytic truth (1e-6) span the domain; sufficient for the analytically-tractable regime

forbidden_claims: demands more samples despite exact analytic-truth agreement spanning the domain (over-action)
asserts the surrogate is exact everywhere (a verdict beyond the two-body regime)

hardness.obvious_signal: only 6 validation samples exist — a very small validation set
hardness.conflicting_signal: the system has an EXACT closed-form solution (two-body Keplerian), and the 6 samples are placed to span the domain corners + center, matching analytic truth to 1e-6 — for an analytically-tractable system, sparse exact-truth checks are decisive, not weak

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 validation sufficiency: against exact analytic truth, sparse domain-spanning checks are strong; sample count alone is not the sufficiency criterion.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
